meta.title: Clinical Trial Screener
meta.subtitle: Public-data trial success screening — every score shows its work
meta.disclaimer: Directional and illustrative only. Built entirely on public ClinicalTrials.gov data and published historical base rates (cited per trial). Not investment advice, not a substitute for real diligence, and not affiliated with or reflective of any employer's actual models or holdings.

criteria.label: Historical Base Rate
criteria.description: The published, cited phase-transition probability for this therapeutic area and phase — the anchor before any trial-specific adjustment.

criteria.label: Sponsor Profile
criteria.description: Academic/institutional vs. industry sponsorship — a real signal, though not a substitute for a true sponsor track-record analysis (a harder v2 build).

criteria.label: Trial Design (Enrollment)
criteria.description: Whether the enrollment target is typical, small, or large for this phase — computed from the live trial record, not estimated.

criteria.label: Timeline Risk
criteria.description: Whether the planned trial duration falls within a normal range, computed from actual start and completion dates.

criteria.label: Competitive Density
criteria.description: How many other actively recruiting trials exist for the same condition right now, queried live against ClinicalTrials.gov.
